# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
        node-version: [16.x, 18.x]
        python-version: [3.8, 3.9]

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        cache: 'npm'

    - name: Setup Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v4
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
        cache: 'pip'

    - name: Cache node_modules
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      id: cache-node-modules
      with:
        path: |
          **/node_modules
          !**/node_modules/**/node_modules
        key: node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}-${{ matrix.node-version }}
        restore-keys: |
          node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.node-version }}-

    - name: Cache pip dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      id: cache-pip
      with:
        path: ~/.cache/pip
        key: pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt') }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}
        restore-keys: |
          pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}-

    - name: Cache configuration files
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      id: cache-configs
      with:
        path: |
          .env
          config/
          .github/workflows/
        key: configs-${{ runner.os }}-${{ github.sha }}
        restore-keys: |
          configs-${{ runner.os }}-

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        if [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
          npm ci
        else
          npm install
        fi
        if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
          pip install -r requirements.txt
        fi

    - name: Run tests
      run: |
        npm test
        python -m pytest tests/

    - name: Security scan
      uses: actions/checkout@v3
      with:
        ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha || github.sha }}

    - name: Run security checks
      run: |
        npm audit --audit-level high
        pip check

    - name: Upload coverage
      uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
      with:
        file: ./coverage.xml
        flags: unittests
        name: codecov-umbrella

    - name: Secure environment setup
      run: |
        echo "SECURE_ENV=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "GITHUB_TOKEN=${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "ENCRYPTION_KEY=${{ secrets.ENCRYPTION_KEY }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

    - name: Validate secrets usage
      run: |
        if [ -z "${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" ]; then
          echo "GitHub token is required"
          exit 1
        fi
